constructors.name: Linetype()
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Linetype class

constructors.name: Linetype(Linetype)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Linetype class

params.name: other
params.doc: [Missing <param name="other"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.DocObjects.Linetype.#ctor(Rhino.DocObjects.Linetype)"]

methods.name: AppendSegment
methods.signature: public int AppendSegment(double length, bool isSolid)
methods.summary: Adds a segment to the pattern.

params.name: length
params.doc: The length of the segment to be added.

params.name: isSolid
params.doc: If true, the length is interpreted as a line. If false, then the length is interpreted as a space.

methods.name: ClearId
methods.summary: Resets the HasId property of the model component to false, if possible.

methods.name: ClearIndex
methods.summary: Resets the HasIndex property of the model component to false, if possible.

methods.name: ClearName
methods.summary: Resets the HasName property of the model component to false, if possible.

methods.name: CreateFromPatternString
methods.signature: public static Linetype CreateFromPatternString(string patternString, bool millimeters)
methods.summary: Creates a linetype from a pattern string. Values greater than zero represent line segments, and values less than or equal to zero represents space segments.

params.name: patternString
params.doc: The pattern string.

params.name: millimeters
params.doc: Specify true if the pattern is represented in millimeters. Specify false if the pattern is represented in inches.

returns.doc: A valid linetype if successful, null otherwise.

methods.name: DataCRC
methods.summary: Increments the Cyclic Redundancy Check value by this instance.

params.name: currentRemainder
params.doc: The current remainder value.

methods.name: Default
methods.summary: Set linetype to default settings.

params.name: key
params.doc: [Missing <param name="key"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.DocObjects.Linetype.DeleteUserString(System.String)"]

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.summary: Actively reclaims unmanaged resources that this instance uses.

methods.name: DuplicateLinetype
methods.summary: Duplicates a linetype, clears the name, id, and locked bits.

returns.doc: The duplicated linetype if successful, null otherwise.

methods.name: EnsurePrivateCopy
methods.summary: If you want to keep a copy of this class around by holding onto it in a variable after a command completes, call EnsurePrivateCopy to make sure that this class is not tied to the document. You can call this function as many times as you want.

methods.name: GetObjectData
methods.signature: public virtual void GetObjectData(SerializationInfo info, StreamingContext context)
methods.summary: Populates a System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo with the data needed to serialize the target object.

params.name: info
params.doc: The System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo to populate with data.

params.name: context
params.doc: The destination (see System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext) for this serialization.

methods.name: GetSegment
methods.signature: public void GetSegment(int index, out double length, out bool isSolid)
methods.summary: Gets the segment information at a index.

params.name: index
params.doc: Zero based index of the segment.

params.name: length
params.doc: The length of the segment in millimeters.

params.name: isSolid
params.doc: If the length is interpreted as a line, true is assigned during the call to this out parameter. If the length is interpreted as a space, then false is assigned during the call to this out parameter.

methods.name: GetTaperPoints
methods.summary: Taper points are positions/width combinations along the length of a curve

methods.name: GetUserString
methods.summary: Gets user string from this geometry.

params.name: key
params.doc: id used to retrieve the string.

returns.doc: string associated with the key if successful. null if no key was found.

methods.name: GetUserStrings
methods.summary: Gets a copy of all (user key string, user value string) pairs attached to this geometry.

methods.name: IsValidWithLog
methods.summary: Determines if an object is valid. Also provides a report on errors if this object happens not to be valid.

params.name: log
params.doc: A textual log. This out parameter is assigned during this call.

returns.doc: true if this object is valid; false otherwise.

methods.name: LockId
methods.summary: Locks the component Id property.

methods.name: LockIndex
methods.summary: Locks the component Index property.

methods.name: LockName
methods.summary: Locks the component Name property.

methods.name: PatternString
methods.summary: Returns a string that represents the pattern of the linetype, which can be used in user interface. Values greater than zero represent line segments, and values less than or equal to zero represent space segments.

params.name: millimeters
params.doc: If true, the string is formatted in millimeters. If false, the string is formatted in inches.

methods.name: ReadFromFile
methods.summary: Reads linetypes from either a Rhino .3dm file or an AutoCAD .lin file.

params.name: path
params.doc: The path to the file to read.

returns.doc: An array of linetypes if successful, otherwise an empty array.

methods.name: RemoveSegment
methods.summary: Removes a segment in the linetype.

params.name: index
params.doc: Zero based index of the segment to remove.

returns.doc: true if the segment index was removed.

methods.name: RemoveTaper
methods.summary: Remove taper information for stroke

methods.name: SetSegment
methods.signature: public bool SetSegment(int index, double length, bool isSolid)
methods.summary: Sets the length and type of the segment at index.

params.name: index
params.doc: Zero based index of the segment.

params.name: length
params.doc: The length of the segment to be added in millimeters.

params.name: isSolid
params.doc: If true, the length is interpreted as a line. If false, then the length is interpreted as a space.

returns.doc: true if the operation was successful; otherwise false.

methods.name: SetSegments
methods.summary: Set all segments.

params.name: segments
params.doc: An array of segments lengths. Lengths >= 0 are interpreted as a line. Lengths < 0 are interpreted as a space.

returns.doc: true if the segments were replaced

methods.name: SetTaper(Double, Double)
methods.signature: public void SetTaper(double startWidth, double endWidth)
methods.summary: Set taper to a simple start width / end width

params.name: endWidth

methods.signature: public void SetTaper(double startWidth, Point2d taperPoint, double endWidth)
methods.summary: Set taper for this linetype width a single internal taper point

params.name: taperPoint

methods.name: SetUserString
methods.signature: public bool SetUserString(string key, string value)
methods.summary: Attach a user string (key,value combination) to this geometry.

params.name: key
params.doc: id used to retrieve this string.

params.name: value
params.doc: string associated with key.

methods.name: ToJSON
methods.summary: Create a JSON string representation of this object

params.name: options
params.doc: [Missing <param name="options"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.Runtime.CommonObject.ToJSON(Rhino.FileIO.SerializationOptions)"]

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Returns the name of the model component type, and then its name and index.
methods.remarks: This is provided as a visual aid. Do not rely on this for serialization.

properties.name: AlwaysModelDistances
properties.summary: Linetype patterns and widths are typically interpreted as distances on the printed output when printing. In this case AlwaysModelDistances is false (default). When set to true, the linetype pattern and width will be interpreted as being in world distances. This is useful for cases like modeling a road as a single curve.

properties.name: ComponentStatus
properties.summary: Gets or sets the component status of the model component.

properties.name: ComponentType
properties.summary: Returns LinePattern.

properties.name: DeletedName
properties.summary: Gets the name of a component that is deleted.

properties.name: Disposed
properties.summary: Indicates if this object has been disposed or the document it originally belonged to has been disposed.

properties.name: HasId
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component has an ID.

properties.name: HasIndex
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component has an Index.

properties.name: HasName
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component has a Name.

properties.name: HasUserData
properties.summary: Gets true if this class has any custom information attached to it through UserData.

properties.name: Id
properties.summary: Gets or sets the ID of the current instance.

properties.name: IdIsLocked
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component ID is already locked.

properties.name: Index
properties.summary: Gets or sets the model component index attribute.

properties.name: IndexIsLocked
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component Index is already locked.

properties.name: InstanceDefinitionModelSerialNumber
properties.summary: When a component is in a model as part of the information required for a linked instance definition, this value identifies the linked instance definition reference model.
properties.remarks: Reference components are not saved in .3dm archives. Typically this value is set and locked by the code that adds a component to a model. This value is not saved in .3dm archives.

properties.name: InUse
properties.summary: Returns true if the linetype is in use by a Rhino object, a layer, an instance definition, or a section style.

properties.name: IsComponentStatusLocked
properties.summary: The component status itself can be locked. This returns an indication.

properties.name: IsDeleted
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this linetype has been deleted and is currently in the Undo buffer.

properties.name: IsDocumentControlled
properties.summary: If true this object may not be modified. Any properties or functions that attempt to modify this object when it is set to "IsReadOnly" will throw a NotSupportedException.

properties.name: IsModified
properties.summary: true if this linetype has been modified by LinetypeTable.ModifyLinetype() and the modifications can be undone.

properties.name: IsPatternLocked
properties.summary: Returns true if the pattern is locked and cannot be modified.

properties.name: IsReference
properties.summary: Gets a value indicting whether this linetype is a referenced linetype. Referenced linetypes are part of referenced documents.

properties.name: IsSystemComponent
properties.summary: True if this model component is a system constant. An incomplete list of system constant model components is below:ON_ModelComponent::Unset ON_InstanceDefinition::Empty ON_Linetype::UnsetON_Linetype::ContinuousON_Linetype::ByLayerON_Linetype::ByParent ON_Layer::UnsetON_Layer::Default ON_TextStyle::UnsetON_TextStyle::DefaultON_TextStyle::ByLayerON_TextStyle::ByParent ON_DimStyle::UnsetON_DimStyle::DefaultON_DimStyle::DefaultInchDecimalON_DimStyle::DefaultInchFractionalON_DimStyle::DefaultFootInchArchitectureON_DimStyle::DefaultMillimeterSmallON_DimStyle::DefaultMillimeterLargeON_DimStyle::DefaultMillimeterArchitecture

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Tests an object to see if it is valid.

properties.name: LineCapStyle
properties.summary: Defines how the ends of open curves should be drawn

properties.name: LineJoinStyle
properties.summary: Defines how the corners of curves should be drawn

properties.name: ModelSerialNumber
properties.summary: A value identifying the model that manages this component.
properties.remarks: If the component is being managed by a model, this value identifies the model. In Rhino, this value is the document runtime serial number. Typically this value is set and locked by the code that adds a component to a model. This value is not saved in .3dm archives.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: The name of this linetype.

properties.name: NameIsLocked
properties.summary: Returns a value indicating whether the component Name is already locked.

properties.name: PatternLength
properties.summary: Total length of one repeat of the pattern.

properties.name: ReferenceModelSerialNumber
properties.summary: When a component is in a model for reference, this value identifies the reference model.
properties.remarks: Reference components are not saved in .3dm archives. Typically this value is set and locked by the code that adds a component to a model. This value is not saved in .3dm archives.

properties.name: SegmentCount
properties.summary: Number of segments in the pattern.

properties.name: UserData
properties.summary: List of custom information that is attached to this class.

properties.name: UserDictionary
properties.summary: Dictionary of custom information attached to this class. The dictionary is actually user data provided as an easy to use shareable set of information.

properties.name: UserStringCount
properties.summary: Gets the amount of user strings.

properties.name: Width
properties.summary: Base width for this linetype

properties.name: WidthUnits
properties.summary: Unit system that widths are defined in. UnitSystem.None is default and means that the width is defined in pixels.
